text: The undersigned certifies that no other sums are claimed, and that Subcontractor's laborers, subcontractors and suppliers that have performed or furnished any work for the Project have been paid in full or will be paid in full out of this payment and that none of such laborers, subcontractors or suppliers is or will be entitled to claim or assert any lien or other claim against Contractor, Owner, the Project, or the Property for labor, services, equipment or materials furnished to or for Subcontractor's ac count.
